description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human head with detailed facial features and elaborate, curled hair. The head is mounted on a simple, rectangular pedestal, which sits atop a flat, textured base. The facial expression is serene, with softly modeled eyes, nose, and lips, and the hair is rendered in voluminous, rounded locks that extend to the back of the head. The surface of the sculpture appears rough and weathered, suggesting it may be cast in stone or concrete. The base and pedestal are more geometric and less detailed, providing a strong contrast to the organic form of the head. The overall coloration is a mix of earthy browns and grays, with the base and pedestal slightly darker than the head.
description: A weathered, stylized human head with curled hair, mounted on a rectangular pedestal and flat base, featuring rough, earthy textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, detailed features, and the transition from the head to the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the sculpted curls and the back of the head, with the pedestal and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head and hair texture, with the pedestal and base clearly seen.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the side of the face, ear, and the layered curls, along with the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a flat, textured base that suggests an outdoor or semi-public setting, such as a plaza or park.
